non_goals: adding live mutations outside task-1 allowlist

canonical_product_flow.name: homepage_top_opportunities
canonical_product_flow.normative_rule: top opportunities MUST be sourced from scanner recommendations; /api/v1/ops/messages alert rows are messaging only and MUST NOT be treated as opportunities

canonical_product_flow.name: journal_and_diagnostics_loop
canonical_product_flow.to: opportunity lifecycle state and operator diagnostics

canonical_product_flow.name: ml_augmentation
canonical_product_flow.to: optional ranking/evidence augmentation on same opportunity contract

current_state.recommendation_identity: item_or_market_key is cityHash64(source_row_json) in scanner runtime
current_state.problem: alert_id is run-scoped and unstable across reruns

canonical_rule.definition: deterministic key derived only from semantic fields; rerun-specific fields (scanner_run_id, recorded_at, alert_id, evidence_snapshot) are excluded
canonical_rule.stability: identical semantic_inputs MUST produce the same semantic_key across reruns; changing any semantic input MUST produce a new semantic_key

required_field_rules.item_name: string, display name; MAY equal search_hint when source lacks finer naming
required_field_rules.transform_plan: string, MAY be empty when no transform
required_field_rules.expected_hold_minutes: number|null, additive alias from existing expected_hold_time string
required_field_rules.evidence_snapshot: object|string containing source evidence; must be parseable or safely renderable

UI.contract_requirement: homepage and opportunities surfaces consume scanner recommendation contract

API.contract_requirement: dashboard top opportunities must project scanner recommendations, not messages_payload critical alerts

runtime.contract_requirement: runtime must emit semantic_key deterministically from semantic fields

SQL.contract_requirement: additive schema extensions only; preserve backward reads

observability.contract_requirement: alerts/messages remain diagnostics channel and do not replace recommendation contract

ML.contract_requirement: ML augmentation is additive to opportunities; absence of ML signal must not break base recommendation payload

present_but_placeholder_or_weak.status: derived only in CLI scan plan via best-effort evidence parsing; not persisted or served by API
not first-class in scanner table; often recoverable only from evidence_snapshot
scanner stores expected_hold_time as free-form string
stored as String; may be raw text (qa seed) or JSON object string
dashboard currently maps from critical alert messages, not scanner recommendations
explicitly empty list placeholder in api/ops.py

missing_required_by_contract: dedicated opportunities tab and journal API routes

api: add new opportunity fields to /api/v1/ops/scanner/recommendations while keeping existing keys
add query params for sorting/filtering by contract fields
add /api/v1/journal/* routes without changing existing protected route behavior
runtime: compute and persist semantic_key without removing item_or_market_key
emit expected_hold_minutes alongside existing expected_hold_time until migration completes
sql: add Nullable columns to scanner_recommendations for semantic_key/search_hint/item_name/expected_hold_minutes/liquidity_score/freshness_minutes/gold_cost
add additive views for opportunity read models
ui: add opportunities tab and scanner-backed homepage cards while preserving existing tabs
show diagnostics when recommendation payload is empty/stale
observability: add opportunity freshness and identity-stability metrics
retain existing message severities and alert ack flow
ml: add optional ml_score/ml_reason fields on opportunity payload
gate ML ranking influence behind explicit feature flag
explicitly_incompatible_and_not_allowed_: dropping or renaming existing scanner_recommendations columns
changing alert_id semantics in-place without dual-read compatibility
